text:
[Name] is joined as an intervenor to the proceedings for the following purposes: [insert]

The local authority shall by 4.00pm on [date] serve [name] with a copy of the bundle.

The bundle served on [name] shall [exclude the following documents:] / [be redacted to remove:]

[insert]

Involving the child[ren]

The guardian shall consider whether a meeting between [name(s) of child(ren)] and the judge should occur, and shall file at court and serve on the parties a report with their recommendation by 4.00pm on [date].

At the next hearing the court will consider whether there should be a meeting between [name(s) of child(ren)] and the judge.

A meeting between [name(s) of child(ren)] and the judge will occur at the Family Court sitting at [court name] at [time] on [date]. A note of the meeting shall be served on the parties by the guardian not more than 2 working days following the meeting.

[Name] must explain the outcome of this hearing to the child[ren].

[Name] must give the child[ren] a copy of the [letter from the judge] / [summary of reasons for this order] when explaining the outcome of this hearing to the child[ren].

Issues resolution hearing / early final hearing

The following directions apply in preparation for the issues resolution hearing / early final hearing provided for above:

The respondents shall not later than 3 working days prior to the hearing file at court and serve on the parties a position statement.

The parties shall agree a witness template for the final hearing (if one is required) not later than 2 working days prior to the hearing.

The local authority shall by 11.00am on the working day before the hearing file at court and serve on the parties a case summary, draft order, and the completed witness template for the final hearing.

The court may treat the hearing as an early final hearing and may take evidence and make final orders.

The guardian must attend this hearing unless they have a prior professional commitment and have been excused when this hearing was listed.

[The guardian is excused attendance at this hearing provided they have given full instructions to their advocate.]

Joinder of parties

[Name] is joined as a party to the proceedings.
